name: Income per person
desc: Income per person, version 15, including historical data & projections. Values from 2020 on are projections: OECD Economic Outlook 117 long-term baseline (business-as-usual) 2020-2060 for 48 countries, growth path applied to 2019 levels; OECD ENV-Growth 2023 SSP2 (middle-of-the-road) scenario elsewhere and 2061-2100, growth path applied at the seam.
